mapper.insert: insert into `order`(order_no, num, total, address_id, goods_id, shopkeeper_id, user_id, time, status) values (#{orderNo}, #{num}, #{total}, #{addressId}, #{goodsId}, #{shopkeeperId}, #{userId}, #{time}, #{status})
mapper.update:
update `order`
order_no = #{orderNo},
num = #{num},
total = #{total},
address_id = #{addressId},
goods_id = #{goodsId},
shopkeeper_id = #{shopkeeperId},
user_id = #{userId},
time = #{time},
status = #{status},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select COUNT(*) AS currentNum from `order` where YEAR(time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) and MONTH(time) = MONTH(CURDATE())
and `order`.shopkeeper_id = #{shopkeeperId}

select COUNT(*) AS lastNum from `order` where DATE_FORMAT(time, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m')
and `order`.shopkeeper_id = #{shopkeeperId}

select IFNULL(SUM(total), 0) as currentRevenue from `order` where YEAR(time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) and MONTH(time) = MONTH(CURDATE())
and `order`.shopkeeper_id = #{shopkeeperId}

select IFNULL(SUM(total), 0) as lastRevenue from `order` where DATE_FORMAT(time, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m')
and `order`.shopkeeper_id = #{shopkeeperId}
